title: Watchtower at the Pass
target: commission a new watchtower at the southern pass before winter closes the road

contributions.line: Veska meticulously drafts the structural design, relying on her sharp intelligence to ensure it withstands the spring melt.
Marek keeps a firm eye on the timber, demanding straightness and honesty from the crew despite his fatigue.

outcomeNarrative: The crew's fatigue and the split in leadership slowed progress, leaving the watchtower vulnerable to the coming thaw.
